scripts.build: cargo build --release -p dsx && cd crates/dsx-tauri && pnpm build && cargo build --release -p dsx-tauri
scripts.pack: cargo build --release -p dsx && cd crates/dsx-tauri && pnpm build && cargo build --release -p dsx-tauri
scripts.deb: cargo build --release -p dsx && cd crates/dsx-tauri && pnpm build && cargo build --release -p dsx-tauri
scripts.check: cargo check --workspace && cd crates/dsx-tauri && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cd crates/dsx-tauri && pnpm lint
scripts.clean: cargo clean && rm -rf crates/dsx-tauri/node_modules crates/dsx-tauri/dist crates/dsx-tauri/src-tauri/target
